nasb.text: The canals will emit a stench, The streams of Egypt will thin out and dry up; The reeds and rushes will rot away.

esv.text: and its canals will become foul, and the branches of Egypt’s Nile will diminish and dry up, reeds and rushes will rot away.

cnv.text: 河道必發臭， 埃及眾河流的水必消退乾涸； 葦子和蘆荻都必枯萎。

ccb.text: 河流必发臭， 埃及的河流逐渐枯竭。 芦荻和灯心草必枯死，

csbs.text: 河道必发臭， 埃及的河流必消减而干涸； 芦苇和芦荻必凋萎，
